welcome:
Hello! I'm **BBHH Assistant** 🤖
I can help you with rooms, bookings, spa services, dining and much more.

Choose a topic below or type your question! 😊
fallback:
Thank you for contacting us! I don't have an answer for that question yet.

Please contact us directly:
📞 Hotline: **0123 456 789**
📧 Email: **info@bbhh-resort.com**

quickActions.label: 🏨 Book a Room
quickActions.query: I want to book a room

quickActions.label: 💰 Pricing
quickActions.query: how much does a room cost

responses.greeting:
Hello! I'm **BBHH Assistant** 🤖
Great to meet you! I can help you with rooms, bookings, pricing and resort services. What can I help you with today?
responses.booking:
To book a room at BBHH Resort, you can:

✅ Book directly in the **Rooms** section on the website
✅ Call hotline: **0123 456 789** (24/7)
✅ Email: **booking@bbhh-resort.com**

We'll need your check-in/check-out dates and number of guests!
responses.price:
BBHH Resort Room Rates:

🏠 **Standard** — from $80/night
🏠 **Superior** — from $120/night
🏠 **Deluxe** — from $180/night
🌊 **Ocean View Suite** — from $280/night
👨‍👩‍👧 **Family** — from $220/night
👑 **Presidential** — from $450/night

💡 Prices may vary by season and promotions. Contact us for the best rate!
responses.rooms:
BBHH Resort offers a variety of rooms:

🛏️ **Standard** — up to 2 guests
🛏️ **Superior** — up to 3 guests
🛏️ **Deluxe** — up to 4 guests
🌊 **Ocean View Suite** — up to 5 guests
👨‍👩‍👧 **Family** — up to 6 guests
👑 **Presidential** — up to 8 guests

All rooms include free Wi-Fi, air conditioning, minibar and beautiful views!
responses.pool:
🏊 **BBHH Resort Pool:**

✨ Infinity pool overlooking the ocean (open 6:00–22:00)
✨ Children's pool (60cm depth)
✨ Pool Bar serving refreshing drinks
✨ Free sun loungers & umbrellas

🔒 Pool access for resort guests only.
responses.spa:
💆 **BBHH Spa & Gym Center:**

🌸 **Spa**: Full body massage, hot stone therapy, skincare
💪 **Gym**: Modern equipment, open 5:00–23:00
🧘 **Yoga**: Morning beach classes (7:00–8:00)
🛁 **Jacuzzi**: Premium relaxation pool
🔥 **Sauna**: Dry & steam rooms

Book spa appointments at the front desk for exclusive discounts!
responses.restaurant:
🍽️ **Dining at BBHH Resort:**

☀️ **Breakfast Buffet** (6:30–10:00): 20+ fresh dishes
🌊 **Seafood Restaurant** (11:00–22:00)
🍸 **Sky Bar** rooftop (17:00–24:00)
🍷 **Wine & Dine** — romantic dinner

🎉 Reserve in advance for the best ocean view seats!
responses.location:
📍 **BBHH Resort**
Address: 123 Beach Road, Da Nang, Vietnam

🚗 Distance from Da Nang Airport: **15 minutes** (12km)
🏖️ Directly on My Khe Beach

🚌 **Free airport transfer** for all booked guests!
responses.contact:
📞 **Contact BBHH Resort:**

📱 Hotline: **0123 456 789** (24/7)
📧 Email: **info@bbhh-resort.com**
💬 Zalo / WhatsApp: **0123 456 789**

⏰ Our team is available 24/7, always ready to help!
responses.promo:
🎁 **Current Offers at BBHH Resort:**

⭐ Book 30 days early: **15% off**
⭐ Stay 3+ nights: **10% off**
⭐ Room + Spa combo: save **20%**

👉 See more in the **Offers** section on the website!
responses.checkin:
🕐 **Check-in & Check-out Times:**

✅ **Check-in**: from **2:00 PM**
✅ **Check-out**: before **12:00 PM**

💡 Early check-in & late check-out can be arranged on request. Contact the front desk in advance!
responses.wifi:
📶 **Wi-Fi at BBHH Resort:**

Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the resort:
✅ In-room, beach, pool area
✅ Restaurant & Sky Bar
✅ Lobby & public areas

Password provided at check-in!
responses.family:
👨‍👩‍👧 **BBHH Resort is Family-Friendly:**

✅ Spacious Family rooms for up to 6 guests
✅ Safe children's pool (60cm)
✅ Indoor play area
✅ Special kids' menu
✅ Free for children under 6

Contact us for the best room recommendation!
responses.beach:
🏖️ **BBHH Resort Beach:**

✨ Private beach, 500m long
✨ White sand, crystal-clear water
✨ Umbrella, lounger, surfboard rental
✨ Beach Bar with refreshing drinks
✨ Lifeguards on duty 24/7

🌅 The sunsets here are absolutely stunning!
